Titan Ships and Select Ship Discounts are Now Live!

For the first week, the below ships will be 80% discounted.

The 3 Titans being sold are:
• 1x Pearce T1
• 1x Busan-The Last Stand mk. VIII
• 1x Fimbul ECOS Superphoenix (ECOS)

 The 6 ships being discounted are:
• Pearce D9
• Ogrika Sunpaa
• Busan Maiden Heart
• Fimbul Mamba
• Pearce R6
• Fimbul BYOS Tankship

Reminder: Purchase of these ships will come with a commemorative skin, representing participation in this historic event!
